message:
fix: remove dead maxSize field from MessageDeduplicator (gt-5shd)

The capacity guard was removed in gt-0own (37597906) but the maxSize
field and constructor parameter remained as dead code. Remove them:
- Drop maxSize from struct (never checked after capacity guard removal)
- Simplify NewMessageDeduplicator() to take no parameters
- Replace capacity-focused test with many-messages coverage test
- Remove DefaultMaxSize test that tested dead code

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
